title: pelargonium × clathratum
intro: Pelargonium × clathratum, a member of the Geraniaceae family, is a hybrid plant species known for its unique and delicate appearance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the form of a tea or oil, which is often referred to as 'Rose Geranium' due to its rose-like fragrance. The oil extracted from Pelargonium × clathratum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and promoting a good night's sleep. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often dried and used as a calming tea or added to skincare products for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
